use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Navigation links with styled button appearance
Icon-only buttons for compact UI areas
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component with Radix UI Slot composition and class-variance-authority for flexible variant and size management. Supports 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with proper accessibility focus rings and disabled states. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and can be composed with asChild prop for advanced use cases.
